channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Neymar announces retirement from international soccer after Brazil crashes out of World Cup  Yahoo Sports
  3. Neymar quits international football after Brazil’s World Cup knockout loss  Al Jazeera
  4. Brazil’s loss to Norway leaves players and fans distraught and searching for answers  NBC News
  5. Neymar says after World Cup elimination he is done playing for Brazil’s national team  AP News

item.title: Thousands welcome home Cape Verde footballers after stunning World Cup run - BBC
item.description:
1. Thousands welcome home Cape Verde footballers after stunning World Cup run  BBC
  2. World Cup: Cape Verde's triumphant, near-miraculous run shows expansion was the right move  Yahoo Sports

  4. Obrigado! Heroes' welcome for Cape Verde squad on return from World Cup  Reuters
  5. Cape Verde’s unexpected World Cup run is a reminder of sport’s capacity to surprise - The Athletic  The New York Times

item.title: World Cup 2026: How Folarin Balogun being available changes USMNT odds against Belgium in Round of 16 - Yahoo Sports

item.title: OPEC+ approves further oil output increase as Hormuz exports start to recover - CNBC
item.description:

item.title: RFK Jr. wants you to get more preventive care. Some experts say that's a bad idea. - Politico
item.description: RFK Jr. wants you to get more preventive care. Some experts say that's a bad idea.  Politico
